mapper.select: SELECT m.monitor_id, m.device_id, m.voltage, m.current_a, m.soc, m.power_output, m.solar_generation_kwh, m.charged_energy_kwh, m.used_energy_kwh, m.saved_cost, m.record_time, d.device_name, d.location, d.status AS device_status, g.group_name, w.sky_status, w.rain_type, w.temperature FROM monitoring m JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id LEFT JOIN weather_data w ON w.device_id = d.device_id AND CONCAT(w.fcst_date, w.fcst_time) >= DATE_FORMAT(m.record_time, '%Y%m%d%H00') WHERE m.device_id = #{deviceId} AND m.record_time <= NOW() ORDER BY m.record_time DESC, w.fcst_date ASC, w.fcst_time ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT m.monitor_id, m.device_id, m.voltage, m.current_a, m.soc, m.power_output, m.solar_generation_kwh, m.charged_energy_kwh, m.used_energy_kwh, m.saved_cost, m.record_time, d.device_name, d.location, d.status AS device_status, g.group_name, w.sky_status, w.rain_type, w.temperature FROM monitoring m JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id LEFT JOIN weather_data w ON w.device_id = d.device_id AND CONCAT(w.fcst_date, w.fcst_time) >= DATE_FORMAT(m.record_time, '%Y%m%d%H00') WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY m.record_time DESC, w.fcst_date ASC, w.fcst_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitoring ( device_id, voltage, current_a, soc, power_output, solar_generation_kwh, charged_energy_kwh, used_energy_kwh, saved_cost, record_time ) VALUES ( #{deviceId}, #{voltage}, #{currentA}, #{soc}, #{powerOutput}, #{solarGenerationKwh}, #{chargedEnergyKwh}, #{usedEnergyKwh}, #{savedCost}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM monitoring m JOIN ess_device d ON m.device_id = d.device_id WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId}

SELECT monitor_id, device_id, voltage, current_a, soc, power_output, solar_generation_kwh, charged_energy_kwh, used_energy_kwh, saved_cost, record_time FROM monitoring WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND record_time <= NOW() AND MINUTE(record_time) != 0 ORDER BY record_time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(solar_generation_kwh), 0) FROM monitoring WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND DATE(record_time) = CURDATE()
